COMMON QUESTIONS

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know about our web development methodologies, design timelines, responsive programming, and support options.

Typically, a custom portfolio or small business website takes 2 to 4 weeks from discovery to launch. Complex e-commerce platforms or web applications require 4 to 8 weeks depending on dynamic API structures and specifications.
Custom web design involves writing clean, structured code from scratch using lightweight HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript instead of standard page builders (like Elementor or Wix). This ensures minimal loading times, 100% control over design responsiveness, and optimal SEO indexability.
Yes! Every website we engineer is built mobile-first to adjust seamlessly to all screen viewport sizes. We include proper heading structures (H1-H3), image dimensions to prevent Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS), structured JSON-LD schemas, and robots configuration tags.
Absolutely. We set up high-performance CDN static hosting (like Vercel, Netlify, or cloud setups) and offer monthly support agreements covering content revisions, security updates, domain setup, and ongoing SEO monitoring.

WebAura builds state-of-the-art web products optimized for speed, aesthetics, and high-impact business growth.
